rationale: Educ. Code §33.006 governs school counselor duties and workload allocation. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The primary responsibility of a school counselor is to counsel students to fully develop each student's academic, career, personal, and social abilities.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
